rows.notes: Header/title at top of page clearly legible. No monetary amounts in the row.
Description legible but the amount columns (rows 1-5 flagged in page guidance) show ink bleed/fading; no clear amount visible, so left blank. Low confidence because of fading in amount columns.
Amount '1.18.1' clearly printed in-line with the description and aligns with the expected £/s/d columns. Shillings and pence are within valid ranges. Vertical rule alignment referenced to totals row.
Description legible but amount column is within the faded region (rows 1-5). No clear numeric amount visible; left blank per page guidance. Low confidence due to ink fade.

Amount '4.14.11' is visible in the typed text and in the image but falls within the page's top faded region (rows 1-5). I extracted the figures but lowered confidence because the amount columns in this area show some ink weakness.
Description clear. No amount is present/legible in the £ s d columns for this row; columns here are generally clearer than the top faded block, so higher confidence that there simply is no amount.
Description legible. No monetary amount visible in the £/s/d area for this line.
Row flagged in page guidance (rows 8-11 have noticeable ink bleed). Amount columns are faint here; no reliable numbers readable, so left blank. Low confidence for amounts.

Description text (including '10s') is partially legible but the s/d columns are faded (rows 8-11). No unambiguous numeric values could be aligned to the £/s/d columns, so amounts left blank with low confidence.
Description shows '6:8' but the amount columns are faded in this region (rows 8-11). Unable to place these faint figures into the ruled £/s/d columns with confidence, so left blank.
Description is partially legible but the adjacent £/s/d columns are faint. No reliable numeric extraction possible from the faded area; left blank per guidance.
Description clear; the amount columns for this row show no obvious figures. Confident that no amount is present or legible here.
Description legible. No monetary amounts visible in the £/s/d area for this row.
Description clear and no amount visible in the ruled columns for this line.

Amount '2.7.5d' is present in the handwritten description but this area is flagged by page guidance (rows 15-16) as having noticeable fading/ink bleed; digits are readable but faint. I extracted the figures but kept confidence low because of the local fading.
Amount '2.4.5d' visible in-line but falls in the page-guidance faded block (rows 15-16). Readable but faint — low confidence assigned accordingly.

This is a single logical entry containing bracketed sub-items (Rush; Hopkins). The bracketed description is clear. No single consolidated amount is legible for the main entry in the £/s/d columns; left blank. Moderate confidence in the description but amount unreadable.
Description legible. No clear amounts visible in the £/s/d columns for this row.
Amount '1.16.11' clearly visible and within valid ranges. Vertical alignment with the totals row confirms column placement.
Description legible; no clear amount visible in the amount columns for this row.
Description readable but no monetary figures are clearly aligned to the ruled columns. Moderate-high confidence in description, absence of amount uncertain but no clear digits seen.

rows.description: Cudlington Augm. Rid. ad Fest. Purificationis
rows.notes: Long descriptive line is legible; there appears to be a faint numeric cluster to the right but the pence/shilling alignment is ambiguous (and a possible '12' appears which would violate pence rules). To avoid misalignment errors, amount left blank and moderate confidence assigned.
Description legible. No clear amounts in the ruled £/s/d columns for this line.
Description readable; amount columns show no clear digits for this row.
Description legible. No amount present/legible in the £/s/d columns.

rows.description: Ladlane, Mr Sparks and merit on Ann. 17.13.4
rows.notes: Amount '17.13.4' is clearly written and aligns with the £/s/d column positions taken from the clear totals rows. All parts within valid currency ranges.
Description legible but the nearby amount column is faint; although some faint figures exist to the right they are not unambiguously aligned to £/s/d columns. Left blank with moderate confidence.

rows.description: Backgate { George Ann 2t mich 2t; Jennings Ann 2t mich 2t }
rows.notes: This is a single logical ledger entry with bracketed sub-items (per page guidance). Multiple small numbers appear to the right (sub-item amounts), but a single consolidated total for the Backgate bracket is not unambiguously written in the £/s/d columns. Left blank; low-moderate confidence because bracket and sub-items are clear but amounts are faded/ambiguous.
Primary subtotal line. Page-specific guidance identifies this row as a clear reference for vertical alignment. Numbers are well-aligned and fully legible; used to project column boundaries.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Verman for Batts due to ye Coll. and for so much pd to Mr Berry ye Brewer
rows.notes: Amount '13.17.10' printed at right and clearly legible. Vertical alignment confirmed against the clear totals rows. Description long but readable.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins Bursar for Increments
rows.notes: There is a numeric group to the right (appears as '12.12.9'). The digits are fairly clear though slightly cramped; they conform to currency ranges. Moderate-high confidence.

rows.description: Recd for Genl. Commoners of Mr Vincent & Mr Tresby & Mr Davie & Mr Arscott & Mr Baber
rows.notes: Amount '40.00.0' is clearly written and stands out as a large, legible sum in the receipts block. Column alignment verified with totals row.

rows.description: Mrs for Act supper; and Mr Lane 2t Mr Marker 2t
rows.notes: Amount appears as '04.00.0' adjacent to this line and is reasonably clear. Slight uncertainty whether this is the exact grouping of sub-items, but monetary value and alignment are readable.

rows.description: Backhs for Legg Saturday and Apr Wednesday
rows.notes: Amount read as '2.08.00' in the receipts area. Digits are legible though handwriting of the description is slightly irregular; alignment checked against totals.

rows.description: Sr Potbury 2t Sr Orchard 2t Sr Gee 2t Sr Pennington 2t
rows.notes: This cluster of small items is legible as names with '2t' indications, but the consolidated monetary figure (if any) is not clearly placed in the £/s/d columns. The nearby numeric cluster could belong to this line or the previous; ambiguous alignment so left blank.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins for ye Comoners Library
rows.notes: A small amount '0.8.0' appears associated with a 'Comoners Library' line; it is somewhat obscured/crossed but the '8s' is readable and fits currency rules. Moderate confidence due to partial crossing-out and ink irregularity.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins for increments for ye year July 16th 1701
rows.notes: There is a numeric cluster near the bottom right that reads approximately '27.2.0'. The last pence digit is faint in the bottom-most rows (page guidance mentions fading rows 39-41); I interpreted pence as 0 to maintain valid ranges. Moderate confidence due to fading of the last digits.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins for ye Comoners Library (additional entry / crossed)
rows.notes: A further 'Comoners Library' receipt appears in a lower line with an amount that reads like '19.0.0' but this line is partially crossed and faded. I extracted 19s as pounds 19 with pence 0 to keep values valid; confidence reduced because of crossing-out and fading.

rows.description: Recd of Mr Hutchins (final small crossed/marginal entries)
rows.notes: There are additional faint/crossed entries in the lower margin area. Page guidance warns of fading here (rows 39-41), particularly pence digits. Unable to confidently place numeric values; left blank.
Another faint/crossed receipt line; pence column especially faded making reliable extraction impossible. Left blank with low confidence.
Bottom-most rows are faded (page guidance). The pence digit(s) are obscured on several of these lines; numbers cannot be safely extracted, so left blank.
Final total for the receipts block. Page guidance explicitly identifies this row as a clear reference ('115 00 10'). Numbers are well-aligned and used to confirm vertical rulings.
